{{Quote|Slay him! He is evil. He turns the skin of our people into a filthy cloak.|Pondo|<ref name="teebo" />}}
'''Pondo''' was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] warrior who lived in [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] on the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. When he was still a young adult, Pondo accompanied Chief [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]], [[Warok/Legends|Warok]], and other warriors to track down a monster that, according to a [[Dulok/Legends|Dulok]] named [[Vulgarr/Legends|Vulgarr]], had kidnapped the [[Wokling/Legends|wokling]] [[Malani]]. When all they found was a self-styled Dulok king named [[Ulgo]], Pondo and the others realized that they had been tricked. They then tracked down Vulgarr and his Duloks, attacked them, and freed the woklings that the Duloks had taken captive.<ref name="teebo" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense]]'' {{1st}}
